label_verbatim: Additional information is set forth in the attached Exhibit ____, and made a part hereof.
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for additional authority blocks beyond the three inline slots. Scoped under authority.* (not filing.*) because the exhibit content is the authority recital itself, not a generic filing attachment.
Date the filing was signed by the authorized person(s).

label_verbatim: (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — signer 1
rationale: First authorized signer's name and capacity. Multi-signer Shape D variant (filing.signer_N.* with N=1..3). The N suffix distinguishes from the single-filer Shape D used on MBCA-11/MLLC-12 (filing.signer.printed_name_and_capacity, no N).
